case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. MICHAEL L BELMONTES ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210079942) TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210079942) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BELMONTES, MICHAEL L AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-2024
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210079942) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-17-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210079942) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 75057720)
